note: Data Layer pushes Drupal page/entity/user metadata into the JS window.dataLayer for GTM/analytics. All behavior is driven by the datalayer.settings config object; the module has no permissions, plugin types, or drush commands of its own. Easy = recipe (answer from docs). Medium = introspection (read a known value planted in live config). Hard = execution (write config, verified live). Script paths are relative to /var/www/html.

evals.prompt: In the Drupal Data Layer (datalayer) module, which hook do I implement to alter the whole dataLayer payload just before it is pushed to the browser? Give the exact hook function name.
evals.expected_output: hook_datalayer_alter(array &$data_layer) — receives the assembled payload by reference.

evals.prompt: In the Data Layer module's configuration (datalayer.settings), which boolean setting controls whether the taxonomy terms an entity references are included in the dataLayer output? Name the exact setting key.
evals.expected_output: The output_terms setting in datalayer.settings (default true); terms appear under the entityTaxonomy key.

evals.prompt: In the Data Layer (datalayer) module, which procedural PHP function do I call to add a key/value to the outgoing dataLayer from code (analogous to drupal_add_js for data)? Give the exact function name.
evals.expected_output: datalayer_add(array $data = [], $overwrite = FALSE) — adds keys to the payload; called with no args it returns the current payload.

evals.prompt: This Drupal site has the Data Layer module configured with a customized JSON key for the page entity's type (instead of the default). Inspect the running site (drush available) and tell me the exact key string the entity type is output under.
evals.expected_output: The live datalayer.settings entity_type value is contentType (default would be entityType).

evals.prompt: This Drupal site has the Data Layer module set to expose current-user details, but only on a specific URL pattern. Inspect the running site (drush available) and tell me the exact URL pattern it is configured for.
evals.expected_output: The live datalayer.settings expose_user_details value is /node/* (read from the running config).

evals.prompt: This Drupal site's Data Layer module was configured with a non-default JSON key for the site name value. Inspect the running site (drush available) and tell me the exact key string the site name is output under.
evals.expected_output: The live datalayer.settings site_name value is siteTitle (default would be siteName).

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site (DDEV, drush available), configure the Data Layer module so that BOTH the taxonomy terms an entity references AND opted-in field values are included in the dataLayer output. Apply the change to the live site via drush/config — do not just describe it. Give a one-line summary of what you changed.
evals.expected_output: datalayer.settings has output_terms=true AND output_fields=true. Verified against live config.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site (drush available), configure the Data Layer module so that every entity page also outputs the entity's `uid` and `created` properties in the dataLayer (the global entity meta property list). Apply it to the running site via drush/config. State in one line what you changed.
evals.expected_output: datalayer.settings entity_meta contains both 'uid' and 'created'. Verified against live config.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site (drush available), reconfigure the Data Layer module's output JSON keys to match an external analytics contract: the page entity's type must be output under the key `contentType` (instead of the default entityType), and the site name under `siteTitle` (instead of siteName). Apply both changes to the live site via drush/config. Give a one-line summary.
evals.expected_output: datalayer.settings entity_type=contentType AND site_name=siteTitle. Verified against live config.
